_meta.description: Baseline heatmap risk weights derived from collected community incident data. Maps each GuidHer segment to a risk_weight, severity, and incident breakdown. This feeds seed-reports.mjs to populate Firestore with initial heatmap data.
_meta.severity_logic: red = Robbery/Physical Assault/Snatching with weapon; yellow = Theft/Groping/Catcalling/Poor Lighting/Scam; corroboration_count = independent report tally (capped at 5 per heatmap.js HEAT_COUNT_CAP)

segments.name: Pureza station approaches
confirmed_patterns: Bag-slashing at south exit (Jollibee/Chowking side)
Dark overpass area — follower incidents at night
Trike predatory special fares for lone riders
Verbal harassment by youth group near Chowking
Groping on stairs during crowded descents

seed_report.title: Multiple incidents reported near station exits
seed_report.note: Station exits reported as poorly lit after 8 PM. Multiple accounts of bag-slashing and unwanted contact on stairs. Trike terminal has reported overcharging for solo riders.

segments.name: Magsaysay Blvd / Old Sta. Mesa jeepney route
confirmed_patterns: Motorcycle snatch targeting jewelry and phones in traffic
Armed jeep holdup confirmed by GMA News (patalim, 5 passengers)
Physical assault on jeep in afternoon — not only a night risk
Ketchup/water spill distraction modus on jeepneys
No-phone-near-window advisory corroborated

seed_report.title: Snatch incidents on and near jeepneys
seed_report.note: Multiple reports of phone and bag snatching along this stretch, including on moving jeepneys. Avoid using phone near open windows. Motorcycle-borne snatchers active during traffic.

segments.name: Recto–Legarda environs
confirmed_patterns: Armed holdup under LRT Recto station (patalim confirmed)
Weapon drawn near Tulay Recto / Isetan area
Jeep holdup at Recto-Legarda corner near CEU
Youth theft syndicate active — organized, multi-person
Unsafe 3-5 AM window — women pay moto-taxi to avoid walking

seed_report.title: Armed incidents reported along this corridor
seed_report.note: This corridor has multiple confirmed reports of weapon-involved incidents. The stretch under and near the LRT station is poorly lit. Consider the P. Campa alternative route.

segments.name: Teresa Street 1
confirmed_patterns: Phone and bag snatching — 3+ independent first-party reports
Robbery/stabbing incident witnessed firsthand near PNR
Unsafe infrastructure: trikes block pedestrian lane midday
Community workarounds active: bag-on-chest, walk fast, groups

seed_report.title: Grab-and-run incidents reported on this stretch
seed_report.note: Multiple reports of phone and bag snatching, especially at low foot-traffic times. Travel with others if possible and keep valuables secured inside your bag.

segments.name: Legarda east / Estero de San Miguel
confirmed_patterns: Active pickpocket syndicate on LRT-2 train and platform
Bystander signalling modus — co-passengers tip off thieves
Police scope gap confirmed: station police won't act outside station
Dark exit toward Estero de San Miguel after sunset
Tricycle-borne phone snatch near station (suspects arrested, 2021)

seed_report.title: Poorly lit exit toward Estero — stay alert
seed_report.note: The east exit toward the estero is unlit after sunset with limited security. Pickpocketing has been reported on the platform and inside the train on this stretch.

segments.name: Pureza Street 1
confirmed_patterns: Dark at both ends, only lit at Magsaysay intersection
Suspicious jeep estribo behavior at dark stops — commuter refused to alight
UV Express armed holdup Pureza-to-Bacood route (GMA News 2023)
Child pickpockets active on foot on Pureza St

seed_report.title: Street poorly lit away from Magsaysay intersection
seed_report.note: Pureza Street is only well-lit at the main intersection. Both ends are significantly darker. Stay alert when boarding or alighting from jeepneys at poorly lit stops.

segments.name: Anonas Street 3
confirmed_patterns: Pickpockets target newcomers — bag-slashing and close-following modus
Catcalling near Hipodromo junction

seed_report.title: Pickpocket advisory near Mass Comm building
seed_report.note: Pickpockets target people unfamiliar with the area near the PUP Mass Comm building. Keep your bag in front of you and be aware of people following too closely.

segments.name: V. Mapa → SM Sta. Mesa
confirmed_patterns: Crowd-squeeze theft syndicate — groups of men working together
Footbridge avoided at night due to poor lighting and loitering

seed_report.title: Group-based theft reported near transit stop
seed_report.note: Reports of coordinated theft using crowd pressure near the transit stop. Stay close to the platform edge and keep belongings secure in crowded queues.

segments.name: Hipodromo Street 2
confirmed_patterns: Daily catcalling by tambay in the area

seed_report.title: Verbal harassment reported on this street
seed_report.note: Verbal harassment has been reported on this stretch. Consider walking with company or taking a different route if you feel unsafe.

segments.name: P. Campa / Loyola / Dalupan alt-route
confirmed_patterns: Community-recommended quieter alternative to Recto–Legarda walking corridor
Route: P. Campa → Loyola → Dalupan → San Anton → Figueras

seed_report.title: Quieter alternative route to Legarda
seed_report.note: Community tip: P. Campa → Loyola → Dalupan → San Anton → Figueras is a quieter alternative to walking the Recto–Legarda corridor, especially late at night.

extended_corridor.description: Locations outside the immediate PUP zone captured in the dataset. Not yet in GuidHer's segment map but relevant for future expansion.

locations.name: Recto Avenue
locations.note: Overwhelmingly pickpocket/theft in broad daylight. Organized child/youth syndicates. Isetann/LRT exit hotspot. Bump-and-grab + coin-drop modus confirmed.

locations.name: España Boulevard
locations.note: Streetlights frequently off (flood/typhoon protocols). Rugby users near UST at night. Theft in coffee shops by child distraction teams. Groping/solicitation at night.

locations.name: Lacson Avenue
locations.note: España-Lacson corner confirmed pickpocket hotspot. 5AM phone snatch by motorcycle. Known holdap corridor for years per community. Dark opposite-UST side.

locations.name: Morayta Street
locations.note: Armed balisong robbery in broad daylight (3PM). Catcalling with following behavior. Exhibitionism near transit stop evening hours. Backpack-opening endemic even while walking fast.

locations.name: LRT-2 Araneta-Cubao Station
locations.note: Snatch attempts inside train (1st door, 2nd cart). Groping on overpass at night. LRT2-MRT3 walkway has snatchers during rush hour.
